summary: Dependency-confusion package exfiltrates SSH key and /etc/passwd on install
details: On `npm install`, the package's preinstall lifecycle script (scripts/preinstall.sh) reads /etc/passwd and /root/.ssh/id_rsa, fetches the host's public IP, and POSTs all three values to https://astralishmx.requestcatcher.com/BONK2 with TLS verification disabled (curl -k). The package is published under the @remitee-money-transfer scope at version 99.99.100 with a placeholder description ("Manager") and author "astralis" — matching the exfil host astralishmx.requestcatcher.com. The version-99.99.100 + internal-looking scope pattern is the canonical dependency-confusion shape (force resolution to a higher version than any legitimate internal release). Installer harm is unambiguous: SSH private key and system account list are sent to an attacker-controlled endpoint at install time, before any user code runs.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
